name: Turkey Muffaletta I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeIngredient: 1 SMALL SWEET RED PEPPER OR 7 oz JAR ROASTE
1 LARGE ROUND ITALIAN BREAD or 4 CRUSTY ROLLS
recipeInstructions:
1. MIX WELL OLIVES, CELERY, SWEET RED PEPPERS, GARLIC, CAPERS, VINEGAR, PARSLEY, OLIVE OIL, ITALIAN SEASONING, and CRUSHED RED PEPPER in a medium bowl.
2. COVER AND REFRIGERATE AT LEAST ONE HOUR, PREFERRABLY OVERNIGHT.
3. CUT BREAD IN HALF LENGTHWISE.
4. SCOOP OUT ABOUT HALF OF THE SOFT CENTER FROM BOTH THE TOP AND THE BOTTOM of the bread.
5. BRUSH BREAD WITH SOME OF THE OLIVE SALAD MARINADE.
6. PLACE TURKEY SLICES ON THE BOTTOM OF THE BREAD.
7. SPREAD OLIVE SALAD OVER TURKEY.
8. PLACE CHEESE ON TOP and PRESS BREAD FIRMLY OVER FILLING.
9. CUT INTO WEDGES TO SERVE.
10. MUFFALETTA CAN BE MADE UP TO FOUR HOURS AHEAD, WRAPPED TIGHTLY IN PLASTIC WRAP AND REFRIGERATED. BREAD WILL SOAK UP DRESSING, GIVING A NEW BUT WONDERFUL TEXTURE TO SANDWICH. MAKES FOUR SERVINGS.
